purpose: One medallion per achievement (keys match the achievements table). Today the UI uses Lucide icons; these raise the quality of the achievement modal. 1024x1024, transparent background, shield-shaped backplate. Frame changes by tier.
shared_prompt_body: ornate fantasy achievement medallion, 3D rendered game badge, centered emblem on a shield-shaped backplate, jungle-kingdom dark-fantasy style, teal and gold palette, glowing details, transparent background, premium mobile-game quality, no text

frames_by_tier.gold: ornate golden frame with small gems
frames_by_tier.platinum: radiant platinum frame with a glowing aura

items.prompt: Achievement medallion, simple bronze frame. Emblem: a glowing teal target with an arrow striking the center, wrapped in small jungle vines. Dark-fantasy jungle-kingdom style, teal and gold, glowing, transparent background, 1024x1024, no text.
